titleStmt.title: SII 23.430: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 430. (A.R. No. 430 of 1907.) Śiṉṉamaṉūr, Periyakulam Taluk, Madurai District Rājasiṁhēśvara temple—on the same wall Jaṭ. Vīra-Pāṇḍya (I): year 26: 1278-79 A.D. (?)

summary.p: This seems to record a similar gift of an impost on certain articles of merchandise like betel-nut, pepper and rice agreed to be contributed by the members of the community Padiṉeṇvishayattār of the four nagaram for a festival in Mārgaḻi in the temple of Rājasiṁhēśvaramuḍaiya-Nāyaṉār at Arikēsarinallūr in Aḷa-nāḍu. Mention is also made of a bazaar to the east of Valaṅgai-mīkāmaṉ-tirumaṇḍapam built by (an officer) Pāṇḍiyadaraiyar in the name of Piḷḷai Kulaśēkhara-Mahābali-Vāṇarāyar. The members are stated to have met for their deliberation in the temple of Vikramapāṇḍīśvaramuḍaiya-Nāyaṉār at Śīvallavaṉ-paḍaivīḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ— koccaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīvirapāṇṭiya tevaṟkku yāṇṭu 2 10 6vatu Aḷanāṭṭu Arikecarinallūr Uṭaiyār śrī rājasimhiśvaramuṭaiya nāyināṟku nālu nakarap patiṉeṇviṣayat tārum civallavaṉ paṭaiviṭṭil vikramapāṇṭiśvaramuṭaiya nāyiṉār ko ṟakkūṭi tiruppaṇikku tirukkaimalaril nirvāttuk kaṭṭit tanta muṉṉāḷ yeṭuttup potu ppākkup potikku Orumāp paṇamum miḷaku potikku Iraṇṭu māppaṇamum melait tiruvācalil patiṉeṇ viṣayak kopurattukku Uttamacoḻapurattil tuṟaiyil Eṭukkum paṭṭaṇappakuti Aricip potikku Oru māppaṇamum pākkup potikku Orumāppaṇamum miḷaku potikku Iraṇṭu māppaṇamum patiṉeṇviṣayattār Eḻuntaruḷapaṇṇip potukiṟa mārkaḻit tiru nāḷukku nāṭṭil paṇṭacālaikaḷil koḷḷumavai kuṭukkumavaiyiṟṟu kkup paṇam Oṉṟukku Araikkāṇiyāka vanta paṇam Eṭuttuppotavum
piḷḷai kulacekaramahābelivāṇarāyar perāl pāṇṭiyataraiyar vaitta valaṅkaimikāmaṉ tirumaṇṭapattukkuk kiḻaivaṭṭakaiyil naṭa kkum pākkup potikku Araimā paṇamum miḷaku potikku Orumāp paṇamum Āka Ivvakaippaṭi candrādittavat cellak kalveṭṭik kuṭut tom nālu nakarap patiṉeṇviṣa Ivvaṉaivom Ivarkaḷ Icaiṉtapaṭikku patiṉeṇviṣeyakaṇakku teṉṉavataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 23.430 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
